items.title: Two dead after small plane crashes into Australia airport hangar
items.dek: The aircraft burst into flames after it crashed at Parafield Airport in Adelaide.
items.body: The aircraft burst into flames after it crashed at Parafield Airport in Adelaide.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: 'Historic homecoming' as endangered antelopes flown to Kenya from Czech Republic zoo
items.dek: The mountain bongo is a rare antelope endemic to Kenyan highland forests, with less than 100 in the wild.
items.body: The mountain bongo is a rare antelope endemic to Kenyan highland forests, with less than 100 in the wild.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Japan zoo staffer allegedly dumps wife's body inside incinerator
items.dek: The zoo has had to delay its reopening after a maintenance break, as police investigate the staff member's claim.
items.body: The zoo has had to delay its reopening after a maintenance break, as police investigate the staff member's claim.
items.author: IriLine Desk
